codeReview.summary: Implementation covers the Step 3 refinement requirements: refine UI reveal, empty-input prevention, refinement submission with original constraints, replacement of idea set, repeatable refinement flow, loading/disable behavior, and post-refinement selection. API prompt construction includes refinement instructions while preserving baseline constraints, and tests added in this commit exercise the new refinement paths.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The fullstack-worker skill mandates tests-first TDD (red phase), but this worker session implemented feature files before adding/updating refinement tests while still reporting followedProcedure=true. Skill compliance expectations appear under-enforced or unclear.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: SKILL.md: section '3. Write Tests First (TDD)'. Transcript skeleton sequence shows Edit/Create on src/lib/schemas/generation.ts, src/app/api/generate/ideas/route.ts, src/components/idea-cards.tsx, and src/app/generate/page.tsx before Create/Edit of src/components/idea-cards.test.tsx and src/app/api/generate/ideas/route.test.ts.

summary: Reviewed handoff, transcript skeleton, and commit 35ee641 for generation-refinement. No high-confidence code defects were found in this feature commit; status is pass. Logged one shared-state observation about TDD procedure adherence mismatch in skill guidance versus observed execution.
